trivia_bullets.text: Staff of the Mind Magus is the blue member of the five-card Staff of the Magus artifact cycle, triggering on blue spells or Islands entering. All five originated in M14 (July 2013); this card and Staff of the Flame Magus are the two reprinted in M15 (July 2014). M14 members not reprinted: Death Magus (B, 219), Sun Magus (W, 222), Wild Magus (G, 223). [Scryfall: m14/221, m15/234]
Magic 2015 was released July 18, 2014 as the penultimate annual core set before Wizards retired the product line after Magic Origins (2015). M15 introduced the updated card frame. [Scryfall]

Flavor text: 'A symbol of sagacity in bewildering times.' No speaker attributed. The cycle's flavor lines follow a parallel template — 'A symbol of [virtue] in [adverse] times' — linking all five as a philosophical set. [Scryfall]

Trigger fires on any land with the Island subtype, including dual lands and shocklands. EDHREC rank 17,339 — marginally lower than Flame Magus; seen in mono-blue control or Urza artifact shells that want incidental lifegain. [Scryfall oracle text; EDHREC rank via Scryfall]
Daniel Ljunggren illustrated both M15 cycle reprints (Flame Magus and Mind Magus), sole artist for the two M15 members of a five-card cycle. [Scryfall artist field]
